title: Create: Stats & Additions
description: Graphs and additions for your Factories and many more.
body:
# Well... Who wants to see some numbers? 
<details>
<summary>Also</summary>

(and some _additions_)


</details>

You can also find it in [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-stats-additions)


If you've ever also stared at a spinning mess of belts, shafts, trains, gauges, and pure optimism, this mod is for **us**.

**Create: Stats & Additions** gives your factory actual, readable feedback: graphs, dashboards, alarms, holograms, train tools, compact displays, and a bunch of engineering toys for people who absolutely *will* build a control room just because it looks cool.

This mod helps you **understand why it is being weird today**.

**_Github repo is down for cleaning, I will make it public again, when it is ready. (Soon probably)_**

**_Forge 1.20.1 will not get further updates._**

**_Versions are still in "beta" phase. Saying that, I know my mod/addon still feels raw(?) and complicated, the release build is still in production with many new Create addons to support and many more mechanics. I can only ask for a little bit more patience. I am planning to release the "Release" build by this month/May._**

---

## What it adds

- **Stats Display Panel** - Turns Create data into live graphs, gauges, bars, numbers, and dashboards.
  
  ![Stats Display in Contraption Info mod for Aeronautics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/897c19ec49bb24b4e24548b5dd31a4f9d5fd6a43.png)
### **From Aeronautics balloon**


![Stats Display in Special mod for Stressometer!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89d8cf1ab70bfa0dd367f59b6c7b1b04a1e98372.png)
### **From stressometer**
- **Dashboard Mode** - Packs multiple readouts into one screen for maximum control-room energy.
- **PiP** for **Aerodeck** and **Aeroline** mode.
  ![aerodeck mode in PiP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84832c78315544d7d69073e42697f582cc3d2959.webp)
- **Train Map** - Shows stations, routes, and moving trains like your rail network finally got organized.
- **Stats Configurator** - Tweaks panel settings fast, with copy/paste, because rebuilding the wall again is not character development.
- **Stats Alarm** - Watches panels for trouble, makes noise, throws alerts, and can output redstone when things go wrong.
- **Holographic Projector** - Displays data as a floating hologram, because normal screens were apparently too grounded.
- **Stats Recorder** - Stores incoming data so you can stop saying "I swear it dropped earlier." (CURRENTLY KINDA BROKEN, I know sorry ;/ )
- **Production Detector** - Monitors belts and inventories for activity, throughput, and jams. ( I will definitely redesign it ;( )
- **Status Tower Light** - A simple green/yellow/red machine status light for when you want answers at a glance.
- **Data Dial** - A proper analog-style gauge for live values and comparator output.
- **Mini Display** - A compact wall display for fluids, storage, boilers, and kinetic stats.
---
- **Factory Logic Controller** - (My beloved thing in this mod) Pauses linked factory branches when watched rows go idle, which is honestly healthier for everyone involved.
![Factory Logic Controller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c46dc8652e30ba0304e6057f275745ad9b446786.png)
---
- **Freight Manifest Clipboard** - Lets you plan station cargo without storing the whole logistics system in your brain.

![Freight Manifest Clipboard for orders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b281835a159cf6fdb91f2c63d192b6c70aaa3c79.png)
### **For orders in Manifest list**

### ![Cargo History](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e83f3bae91994ec7a2dc9436e1a78c7770e3e6.png)
### **Cargo history**
---
- **Dispatch Board** - A public live operations board for freight status and delivery handling.

![In Game Dispatch Board](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2976927029441437e242df9c2bcdf2ab9760b703.png)
### **In Game Dispatch Board**


![Dispatch board GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efafd2e789ded3b82a02f9b1964dca81fd34950d.png)
### **Dispatch board GUI**
---
- **Factory Manual** - An in-game guide for when the tooltip gives you vibes instead of answers.
- **Many more kinetic controllers** like a **load balancer** or **auto fuse**, **auto variable clutch** and some more. Go check it out!
---
![Load balancer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06f97b3a8af27ffb6f34d60310d23211abdc34b4.png)
### **Load balancer**
---


- OHHH and also try with Aeronautics :) I love that mod!!!

---

## Why use it?

Because Create factories are beautiful, but "I can kind of tell from the sound" is not a monitoring system.

This mod is for:
- people who love **control rooms**
- people who want **real factory feedback**
- people who build **train networks**
- people who enjoy **tiny useful displays**
- people who add **just one more dashboard** and somehow end up with twelve

If you like your automation with a little more visibility, a little more personality, and a little less guessing, this should feel right at home.

### _Still heavily underdeveloped. However, I felt like it was nonetheless usable already. So enjoy and give feedback! :)_
